refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model mapping worksite inputs to performance targets
Database schema and storage for performance requirements and history
Update management process with version control and audit trail
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic model mapping worksite inputs to performance targets; Database schema and storage for performance requirements and history; Update management process with version control and audit trail

potential_sources: Data dependencies between derivation and recording
Versioning dependencies between recording and update management
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized with clear interfaces; no cyclic dependencies detected.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate and complete worksite mission context data is available
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider further modularizing update management if complexity grows.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for performance derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs performance targets and updates to other system modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange for updates and history synchronization

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the full performance requirement lifecycle; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module interacts with performance data but should not own derivation or management.
Limited role in performance requirement lifecycle; mainly consumes performance targets.
Safety Services focus on alerts and safety policies, not performance requirement management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation, recording, and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module if all lifecycle aspects are centralized
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data loss
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity; consider splitting update management into a submodule if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional requirements are clearly refined and mapped to logical design parameters with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support ownership assignment; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution IM with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing update management if complexity increases
Ensure robust interface definitions for Telemetry and Network Link

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects appropriate DPs, and assigns IM boundaries with clear interfaces and manageable risks. No further decomposition is required at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Current artifacts meet requirements and constraints; no immediate revision needed.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle complexity of performance requirement lifecycle
open_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Interface robustness with Telemetry and Network Link
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from worksite inputs to performance targets
History maintenance of baselines and calibration updates
